title: Bundle Recipe Backport
body:
A bundle can now be crafted using only one leather and one string, you can even do it without a crafting table!

![Crafting Recipe Demonstration](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30ad7531623880e0fec3e34abc780fb449c517c5.png)


Extra: you can also craft it normally.

# REQUIREMENTS

**ONLY** requirement is to have bundles enabled in your world.
